title: Quorum Register Request
description: Payload a buyer/agent sends in negotiation.requirements to register a repo for monitoring.

ecosystems.description: Dependency ecosystems to monitor. MVP runs the full pipeline on 'npm' only; others are discover-and-display.

risk_policy.description: Controls confidence target, escalation aggressiveness, and per-event budget cap.

budget_cap_usdc.description: Hard ceiling on total spend per event. Defaults from policy if omitted (startup 0.05, balanced 0.15, enterprise 0.25).
